title: Test Implement Guardrail Metadata And Role-Scope Blocked Results

handoff_summary.completed: Updated [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py#L357) to verify `guardrails.agent_type`, `guardrails.captured_at`, `guardrails_applied` execution-history details, and full blocked-result persistence in both `handoff_summary` and `metadata["last_agent_result"]`. Verified with `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest tests.test_orchestrator` (27 tests, passing).
handoff_summary.remaining: No code defects were found in the B0004 implementation under the exercised scenarios. Residual tooling gap: `pytest` is unavailable in the current venv, and running `python -m unittest tests.test_orchestrator` without `PYTHONPATH=src` imports a different checkout's package module.
handoff_summary.risks: Test execution currently depends on `PYTHONPATH=src` in this worktree. If downstream agents rely on plain `python -m unittest` or `pytest`, they may get false failures until the local test invocation is normalized or the environment is fixed.
handoff_summary.next_action: If desired, standardize the repo test command so the worktree-local `src/` package is always used, and install `pytest` in the project venv if that is the intended runner.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Low functional risk from this change set; the main overlap risk remains concurrent edits to `tests/test_orchestrator.py` while B0004 implementation work is still landing in `scheduler.py` or `storage.py`.

conflict_risks: Low functional risk from this change set; the main overlap risk remains concurrent edits to `tests/test_orchestrator.py` while B0004 implementation work is still landing in `scheduler.py` or `storage.py`.
